characters.name: Amy
characters.description: Amy was a character who only appeared in Barney & the Backyard Gang. She is Michael's little sister. She was played by Becky Swonke. In these eighth videos, she wore a ponytail until she wore her hair down inCampfire Sing-Along. Then, she wore a side ponytail inBarney Goes to School. her ponytail isWaiting for Santa. In the later videos, she wore different half side ponytail. InThe Backyard Show, she was seven years old, inThree WishesandA Day at the Beach, she was eight years old, inWaiting for Santa, Campfire Sing-Along, andBarney Goes to School, she was nine years old, and inBarney in ConcertandRock with Barney, she was ten years old.

characters.name: Barney
characters.description: Barney is a friendly purple dinosaur who was created in 1987 and made his debut inThe Backyard Show. Barney is the leader of sorts for the backyard gang. He comes to life through the backyard gangs imagination when ever they need help with a problem that they have. Write the second section of your article here. Don't forget to add a category, to help people find the article.

characters.name: Jeffery
characters.description: Jeffrey is a character who only appeared inCampfire Sing-Along. Jeffrey wore an orange shirt with suspenders, shorts, a red cap, shoes, and a brown jacket. He was 10, 11, or 12 inCampfire Sing-Along.

characters.name: Michael
characters.description: Michael was a character who appeared in Barney & the Backyard Gang and the first two seasons of Barney & Friends. He is Amy's brother and Barney's old friend. InThe Backyard Show, he was nine years old. InThree WishesandA Day at the Beach, he was ten years old

characters.name: Tina
characters.description: Tina was a character who appeared in the Barney & the Backyard Gang and Barney & Friends. She is Luci's little sister.
